name: Allow SOL to Treasury
description: Allow SOL transfers to your treasury wallet

rule.message: ✅ ALLOWED: SOL transfer to treasury wallet

metadata.note: Replace YOUR_TREASURY_WALLET_HERE with your actual wallet address

name: Block SOL to Known Scam Addresses
description: Prevent transfers to known scam addresses

rule.message: 🚨 BLOCKED: SOL transfer to known scam address

metadata.note: Add known scam addresses to the value array

name: Block Large SOL to Any Address
description: Block large SOL transfers as fallback

rule.message: 🚨 BLOCKED: Large SOL transfer (> 5 SOL) - verify recipient address

name: Alert on All SOL Transfers
description: Warn on any SOL transfer for review

rule.message: ⚠️ WARNING: SOL transfer detected - verify recipient
